stemHtml: The uplink datalink messages "CLIMB TO REACH [altitude] BY [time]" means…

options.a: a climb is to commence at a rate such that the specified level is reached at or before the specified time.
options.b: a climb is to commence at or before the specified time.
options.c: a climb is to commence at or after the specified time.
options.d: a climb is to commence at a rate such that the specified level is reached at or after the specified time.
